ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., SH600158) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_watchlist" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the stock to their watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock added to the watchlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_watchlist_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_watchlist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news article is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the analytics data is for */,
  "moving_average_50" REAL /* 50-day moving average of the stock's price */,
  "moving_average_200" REAL /* 200-day moving average of the stock's price */,
  "relative_strength_index" REAL /* Relative Strength Index (RSI) of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_analytics_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
